Package com.iwedia.dtv.service

Enum Class ServiceType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ServiceType>
com.iwedia.dtv.service.ServiceType
All Implemented Interfaces:
android.os.Parcelable, Serializable, Comparable<ServiceType>, Constable
public enum ServiceType extends Enum<ServiceType> implements android.os.Parcelable
Type of service available: DIG_TV DIG_RAD TYPE_TTXT NVOD_REF NVOD_TIME_SHIFT MOSAIC ADV_CODEC_DIG_RAD ADV_CODEC_MOSAIC DATA_BROADCAST COMMON_INTERF_USAGE RCS_MAP RCS_FLS DVB_MHP MPEG2_HD_DIG_TV ADV_CODEC_DIG_TV ADV_CODEC_SD_NVOD_TIME_SHIFT ADV_CODEC_SD_NVOD_REF ADV_CODEC_HD_DIG_TV ADV_CODEC_HD_NVOD_TIME_SHIFT ADV_CODEC_HD_NVOD_REF ANALOG UNDEFINED
